ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot relaxing on a beach, perhaps applying sunscreen or enjoying the shade. The sequence will start with the robot's arms relaxed at its sides, then move to a position as if applying sunscreen to its face, and finally return to a relaxed position. The movement should be slow and deliberate, reflecting a relaxed beach-going experience. Frame 1: Both arms are down at the sides. Frame 2: The robot brings both arms up to its face. Frame 3: The robot applies sunscreen to its face. Frame 4: The robot puts both arms back down to its sides. Frame 5: The robot's arms return to a relaxed position.  The movement of the arms will be smooth and natural, reflecting the relaxed nature of the scene. The robot's movement will be slow and deliberate, reflecting the relaxed mood of the beach.  The overall effect is to create a feeling of calm and relaxation.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed at sides, beach day begins
both arms lift slowly to the face
hands gently apply sunscreen to the face
arms lower slowly back to the sides
robot relaxes on the beach, at ease
